generations.content_context: BYTE Protocol reported over 10,000 messages settled on testnet, signaling developer interest in data settlement layers on Arbitrum.
generations.scene_or_viz_prompt:
Main metric panels:  
- Total Messages Settled: 10,000+ (holographic counter, pulsing cyan)  
- Testnet Activity Gauge (arc gauge, magenta highlights)  
- Developer Interest Index (bar or ring indicator, orange glow)  

Connection lines:

Color accents:  
- Cyan (metrics), magenta (gauges/flow), orange (emphasis and highlight indicators)
generations.full_prompt:
Create a professional data visualization for a tech news publication.

VISUALIZATION TYPE: Main metric panels:  
- Total Messages Settled: 10,000+ (holographic counter, pulsing cyan)  
- Testnet Activity Gauge (arc gauge, magenta highlights)  
- Developer Interest Index (bar or ring indicator, orange glow)  

Connection lines:  
- Animated data flows linking "Messages Settled" to "Developer Interest," indicating causality  
- Thin, glowing lines (cyan/magenta gradients) between all panels to suggest data synchrony  

Color accents:  
- Cyan (metrics), magenta (gauges/flow), orange (emphasis and highlight indicators)

CONTENT CONTEXT:
BYTE Protocol reported over 10,000 messages settled on testnet, signaling developer interest in data settlement layers on Arbitrum.

STYLE: Holographic heads-up display with neon metrics, glitch effects, and futuristic UI elements. Sci-fi interface aesthetic.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Professional infographic/dashboard quality
- Clean, polished vector aesthetic
- Include section headers and labels where appropriate
- Strategic use of color to highlight key insights
- Editorial publication quality
- Modern, sophisticated design, cyberpunk HUD, holographic interface, neon glow, futuristic, sci-fi
